summary: Outstanding Miller audience recording with crystal‑clear 24‑bit mix; reviewers give no performance details.
review: All three reviewers rave about the audio fidelity of this Charlie Miller 24‑bit audience tape, calling it superb, perfectly mixed and even better than a soundboard. No comments are made about the musical set, so the show quality cannot be assessed from these notes.

ai_rating.rationale: Three consistent, highly positive reviews focus on exceptional recording quality; lack of performance commentary prevents penalization, yielding a near‑top rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Miller 24‑bit audience tape praised for perfect mix, crystal‑clear sound and superior fidelity to typical soundboard recordings.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No performance details provided; reviewers only discuss audio quality.
